summary: CP for Mamdani question has been stable at 0.90 since Sept 7, with threshold at >91%. Transition rate from 0.90 to above 0.91 is 7% historically. Previous meta-question (>90% on Aug 29) resolved NO with CP of 0.40.
content: CP history analysis: The underlying Mamdani question CP rose to 0.93 in early September but has declined to 0.90 since Sept 7. It's been stable at 0.90 for 8 consecutive data points. The threshold requires strictly >91%. Historical transition rate from 0.90 to >0.91 is only 1/14 (7.1%). With 133 forecasters, the CP is moderately stable. The NYC general election is Nov 4, still 7 weeks away from the Sept 24 resolution date, offering limited catalysts.
